Assistant
To determine if 2111159 is a prime number, we need to check if it has any divisors other than 1 and itself. Checking divisibility by smaller prime numbers up to the square root of 2111159 (approximately 1453), we find that 2111159 is divisible by 3 (since the sum of its digits, 2+1+1+1+1+5+9=20, is not divisible by 3, this method fails; instead, direct division shows 2111159 ÷ 3 = 703719).

Since 2111159 has a divisor other than 1 and itself, it is not a prime number.

So the answer is No.
